refnamediv.refpurpose: Append an image frame to an open video writer.

listitem.para: Valid video-writer handle returned by a successful call to avifile.
Image to append. IPCV converts it to an 8-bit three-channel frame and resizes it to the dimensions specified by avifile when necessary.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Appends one frame to an open video writer. The writer must have been created successfully and must not have been closed.
If avifile reports an error, do not call aviaddframe or aviclose with that handle. Correct the output path or codec and create the writer again.

refsection.title: Examples

tr.td: Updated for the OpenCV 5 video-writer gateway.
